name: taskmd
description: Markdown-based task management for software projects. Manage tasks, dependencies, and priorities directly from your editor.

tools.name: list
tools.description: List and filter tasks in a taskmd project

tools.name: get
tools.description: Get full details of a single task by ID, including body content and dependency information

tools.name: next
tools.description: Get ranked task recommendations based on priority, dependencies, and critical path analysis

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text search across task titles and bodies, returning matches with snippets

tools.name: context
tools.description: Resolve relevant file paths for a task based on its touches (scopes) and explicit context fields

tools.name: set
tools.description: Update fields on a task (status, priority, effort, owner, tags)

tools.name: validate
tools.description: Validate task files for correctness, checking required fields, enum values, dependencies, and cycles

tools.name: graph
tools.description: Get the task dependency graph as JSON with nodes, edges, and cycle detection

tools.name: status
tools.description: Get lightweight metadata for a task (no body content, no resolved dependencies)
